principle: No feature ships until it survives the live user loop.
features_verified: Dedicated Listening Lab tab is served by the active web app.
Project can be created and opened.
Continue Extraction generates a system-authored breakdown draft.
Breakdown includes section map, glossary, and sound example.
Save Extraction commits the extraction to the library and linked Music memory.
Project delete permanently removes project, extractions, and linked memory entry.
Full app loop check still passes Command Center, Pull, Stock Intel, Listening Lab, and Memory Loop.
